snapshot.active_constraints: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, vcpkg, C++17, DOD, Branchless, Zero Heap, Static Runtime (/MT).
snapshot.key_knowledge: - openNURBS 8.x integrated via custom vcpkg git registry. - Overlay port pulls from mcneel/opennurbs branch 8.x. - portfile.cmake handles manual header installation and transitive linkage (shlwapi, zlib). - RhinoIO.cpp uses ONX_Model for modern high-level 3DM I/O. - Build pipeline verified with static triplet and forced /MT runtime.
snapshot.artifact_trail: - vcpkg-overlay-ports/: Custom git registry for openNURBS. - vcpkg-configuration.json: Configured to use the local git registry. - include/RhinoIO.h: Quarantined header (No opennurbs.h include). - src/RhinoIO.cpp: Translation logic using ONX_Model and LinearArena. - CMakeLists.txt: Updated for find_package(opennurbs) and /MT linkage. - src/sketch.cpp: Switchboard configured for RHINO_IO_RUN_TEST.
snapshot.task_state: OPENNURBS INTEGRATION COMPLETED. Local build is clean (0 errors). Executable generated at build/bin/AliceViewer.exe. Workspace ready for F5 verification.
